# BlinkCheck (눈을감자) — NALHO

> A free mobile app that measures your blink rate in real time using your smartphone's front camera and coaches you to prevent dry eye syndrome.

## What it does

BlinkCheck uses on-device AI to analyze how often you blink while looking at a screen. Most people blink 80% less when focused on a display — a leading cause of dry, irritated eyes. BlinkCheck quantifies that invisible habit and coaches you to blink more.

- **Developer:** NALHO
- **Contact:** nalho.service@gmail.com
- **Platform:** iOS (App Store), Android coming soon
- **Price:** Free
- **App Store:** https://apps.apple.com/kr/app/%EB%88%88%EC%9D%84%EA%B0%90%EC%9E%90-blinkcheck/id6503923480

## Key Features

### Blink Test
Measures blinks per minute (BPM) over a 3–60 minute session and classifies severity:

- **Normal:** ≥20 BPM
- **Mild:** 14–19 BPM — reduced blinking; conscious effort recommended
- **Moderate:** 8–13 BPM — dry eye risk
- **Severe:** <8 BPM — consult an eye doctor

### Blink Coach
Delivers personalized vibration alerts timed to your natural blink rate (set 20% tighter than your measured baseline). Distinguishes natural blinks from alert-triggered ones to measure coaching effectiveness. Includes 20-20-20 rule mode (look 20 ft away for 20 seconds every 20 minutes).

### Calibration
A 10-second personalized setup that tunes detection thresholds to your eyes. iOS uses ARKit; Android uses ML Kit. Accounts for head posture to warn on excessive rotation.

### Records & Analytics
Session history with trend analysis (improving / worsening / stable), multi-period filters (1 week / 1 month / 3 months / all-time), and test vs. coaching comparison charts.

## Why use BlinkCheck?

| Other solutions | BlinkCheck |
|---|---|
| Generic 20-20-20 timers | Personalized coaching based on your actual blink rate |
| Guesswork | Real-time blink detection via on-device AI |
| Stores your camera feed | Zero data leaves your device — ever |

## Who it's for

- Office workers and developers with 8+ hours of screen time daily
- Students in long study or exam-prep sessions
- Post-LASIK / LASEK patients who need to blink consciously during recovery
- Anyone diagnosed with dry eye syndrome

## Technical details

- **Privacy:** All camera processing is on-device. No video is stored or transmitted.
- **Detection algorithm:** Dual-threshold hysteresis state machine to filter noise
- **Platform optimization:** iOS (ARKit, high fidelity), Android (ML Kit, tuned thresholds)
- **Local storage:** MMKV key-value store — no backend

## FAQ

**Does BlinkCheck store my camera footage?**
No. All processing is done on-device in real time. No video data is stored or sent to any server.

**What's a healthy blink rate?**
20+ BPM is normal. Screen focus can drop that to 3–5 BPM. BlinkCheck measures exactly where you stand.

**Can I use it after LASIK or LASEK surgery?**
Yes — it's especially useful during recovery when conscious blinking is recommended.

**What is the 20-20-20 rule?**
Every 20 minutes, look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds to reduce eye strain. BlinkCheck has a coaching mode that reminds you automatically.

**Which devices are supported?**
Currently iPhone (iOS 15.5+) via the App Store. Android is coming soon.

---

## 앱 소개 (한국어)

눈을감자(BlinkCheck)는 스마트폰 전면 카메라와 온디바이스 AI를 사용해 사용자의 눈 깜빡임 횟수를 실시간으로 분석합니다. 화면 집중 시 눈 깜빡임은 최대 80%까지 줄어들며, 이는 안구건조증의 주요 원인입니다.

### 심각도 기준
- 정상: 분당 20회 이상
- 경미: 분당 14~19회
- 주의: 분당 8~13회 (안구건조증 위험)
- 심각: 분당 8회 미만 (안과 상담 권장)

### 대상 사용자
- PC·스마트폰을 하루 8시간 이상 사용하는 직장인·개발자
- 장시간 학습하는 학생
- 라식·라섹 수술 후 회복 중인 환자
- 안구건조증 진단을 받은 사람
